case_title: DAVID A ALLEN VS. AT & T CORP

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLEN, DAVID A IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AT & T CORP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

RETURNED MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED AFTER ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD." AS TO DEFENDANT AT & T CORP
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLEN, DAVID A AS TO DEFENDANT AT & T CORP

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AT & T CORP
